sentences.target: J'adore cette saison pour les balades.

translations.fr: J'adore cette saison pour les balades.
translations.en: I love this season for walks.
translations.es: Me encanta esta estación para pasear.
translations.de: Ich liebe diese Jahreszeit für Spaziergänge.
translations.it: Adoro questa stagione per le passeggiate.
translations.ko: 이 계절에 산책하는 걸 정말 좋아해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我很喜欢这个季节去散步。
translations.yue: 我好鍾意呢個季節去散步。
translations.ru: Я обожаю это время года для прогулок.
translations.pt: Eu adoro esta estação para caminhadas.
translations.he: אני אוהב את העונה הזאת לטיולים.
translations.tr: Bu mevsimde yürüyüş yapmayı çok seviyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi rất thích mùa này để đi dạo.
translations.nl: Ik hou van dit seizoen om te wandelen.
translations.uk: Я обожнюю цю пору року для прогулянок.
translations.hu: Imádom ezt az évszakot a sétákhoz.
translations.hi: मुझे टहलने के लिए यह मौसम बहुत पसंद है.
translations.pl: Uwielbiam tę porę roku na spacery.
translations.el: Λατρεύω αυτή την εποχή για βόλτες.
translations.nb: Jeg elsker denne årstiden for gåturer.
translations.id: Aku sangat suka musim ini untuk jalan-jalan.
translations.sv: Jag älskar den här årstiden för promenader.
translations.cs: Miluji toto roční období na procházky.
translations.da: Jeg elsker denne årstid til gåture.
translations.ja: この季節は散歩にぴったりで大好きです。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun ‘je’ elided before a vowel-initial verb; 1st person singular subject of the verb.
Present indicative, 1st person singular; main verb taking ‘cette saison’ as direct object and a purpose PP ‘pour les balades’.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; modifies ‘saison’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘adore’.
Preposition introducing a purpose complement (‘pour les balades’).
Definite article, plural; modifies ‘balades’.
Common noun, feminine plural; object of the preposition ‘pour’.

sentences.target: Les saisons passent trop vite ici.

translations.fr: Les saisons passent trop vite ici.
translations.en: The seasons go by too fast here.
translations.es: Las estaciones pasan demasiado rápido aquí.
translations.de: Die Jahreszeiten vergehen hier zu schnell.
translations.it: Le stagioni qui passano troppo in fretta.
translations.zh-Hans: 这里的季节过得太快了。
translations.ru: Здесь времена года пролетают слишком быстро.
translations.pt: As estações passam rápido demais aqui.
translations.vi: Các mùa ở đây trôi qua quá nhanh.
translations.nl: De seizoenen gaan hier te snel voorbij.
translations.uk: Пори року тут минають надто швидко.
translations.hu: Itt túl gyorsan múlnak az évszakok.
translations.hi: यहाँ ऋतुएँ बहुत तेज़ी से गुजरती हैं.
translations.pl: Pory roku tutaj mijają zbyt szybko.
translations.el: Οι εποχές περνούν εδώ πολύ γρήγορα.
translations.id: Musim-musim di sini berlalu terlalu cepat.
translations.cs: Tady roční období plynou příliš rychle.
translations.da: Årstiderne går alt for hurtigt her.
translations.ja: ここでは季節が過ぎるのが早すぎます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, plural; modifies ‘saisons’.
Common noun, feminine plural; subject of ‘passent’.
Present indicative, 3rd person plural; intransitive here, with manner and degree adverbs.
Degree adverb modifying ‘vite’.
Manner adverb modifying ‘passent’.
Locative adverb indicating place.

translations.en: The new season comes out tomorrow.
translations.vi: Mùa mới ra mắt vào ngày mai.
translations.nl: Het nieuwe seizoen komt morgen uit.
translations.hu: Az új évad holnap jön ki.
translations.hi: नया सीज़न कल आ रहा है.
translations.nb: Den nye sesongen kommer i morgen.
translations.sv: Den nya säsongen släpps i morgon.
translations.da: Den nye sæson udkommer i morgen.
translations.ja: 新シーズンは明日配信されます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; modifies ‘saison’ (with intervening adjective).
Adjective, feminine singular; modifies ‘saison’.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of ‘sort’.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular; intransitive verb meaning ‘to be released/come out’, with temporal adverb.
Temporal adverb modifying ‘sort’.

sentences.target: C'est la saison des fraises au jardin.
sentences.reading: /sɛ la sɛ.zɔ̃ de fʁɛz o ʒaʁ.dɛ̃/

translations.fr: C'est la saison des fraises au jardin.
translations.ipa: /sɛ la sɛ.zɔ̃ de fʁɛz o ʒaʁ.dɛ̃/
translations.en: It's strawberry season in the garden.
translations.es: Es temporada de fresas en el jardín.
translations.it: È la stagione delle fragole in giardino.
translations.yue: 花園而家係士多啤梨季節。
translations.pt: É época de morangos no jardim.
translations.vi: Trong vườn đang là mùa dâu.
translations.nl: Het is aardbeienseizoen in de tuin.
translations.hi: बगीचे में स्ट्रॉबेरी का मौसम है.
translations.pl: W ogrodzie jest sezon na truskawki.
translations.el: Είναι η εποχή των φραουλών στον κήπο.
translations.ja: 庭はイチゴの季節です。

tokens.explanation: Clitic pronoun ‘ce’ elided before vowel; subject in the copular construction ‘c’est’.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative 3rd person singular; links the subject pronoun to the predicate nominal.
Definite article, feminine singular; modifies ‘saison’.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the predicate nominal.
Contraction of ‘de’+‘les’; preposition introducing a genitive-like noun complement (‘des fraises’).
Common noun, feminine plural; complement of ‘des’.
Contraction of ‘à’+‘le’; preposition introducing a locative PP (‘au jardin’).
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition ‘au’.
